items.question: Em la tan sinh vien, tuan dau tien can hoan thanh nhung buoc nao?
items.answer: Trong tuan dau, em hoan thanh checklist onboarding: kich hoat tai khoan, dang nhap portal/LMS, xem lich orientation, xac nhan hoc phi va ho so hanh chinh.

items.question: Lich orientation cho tan sinh vien xem o dau?
items.answer: Em vao portal sinh vien, muc thong bao onboarding de xem lich orientation theo khoa.

items.question: Khong dang nhap duoc LMS thi can lam gi?
items.answer: Em thu reset mat khau tai khoan truong va dang nhap lai. Neu van loi, tao ticket IT kem ma so sinh vien.

items.question: Khi nao mo dang ky mon hoc ky dau?
items.answer: Dang ky mon mo theo lich hoc vu tung ky. Em theo doi portal hoc vu va email thong bao.

items.question: Lam sao de lien he co van hoc tap?
items.answer: Thong tin co van hoc tap duoc hien thi tren portal sinh vien hoac email gioi thieu cua khoa.

items.question: Thu tuc lam the sinh vien nhu the nao?
items.answer: Em nop anh va thong tin theo mau tren portal, sau do theo doi ngay nhan the trong thong bao.

items.question: Xin giay xac nhan sinh vien o dau?
items.answer: Em gui yeu cau qua cong dich vu sinh vien tren portal va theo doi trang thai xu ly.

items.question: Hoc phi ky dau dong bang cach nao?
items.answer: Hoc phi thanh toan qua cong tai chinh tren portal. Em giu bien lai va kiem tra trang thai thanh toan.

items.question: Em xem thong tin hoc bong o dau?
items.answer: Thong tin hoc bong duoc cap nhat tren portal va email truong theo tung hoc ky.

items.question: Dang ky ky tuc xa nhu the nao?
items.answer: Em dang ky tren he thong housing, chon loai phong va tai giay to can thiet trong dot mo dang ky.

items.question: Giua ky em co the doi phong ky tuc xa khong?
items.answer: Viec doi phong phu thuoc cho trong va quy dinh housing. Em gui yeu cau tren he thong de duoc xet.

items.question: Bao hiem y te bat buoc cho tan sinh vien khong?
items.answer: Yeu cau bao hiem y te theo chinh sach tung nam hoc. Em can kiem tra thong bao onboarding moi nhat.

items.question: Lam sao de su dung thu vien va tai nguyen so?
items.answer: Sau khi kich hoat tai khoan truong, em dang nhap he thong thu vien de muon sach va truy cap tai nguyen so.

items.question: Neu em can ho tro tam ly thi lien he o dau?
items.answer: Em lien he bo phan ho tro sinh vien hoac trung tam tu van tam ly qua kenh chinh thuc tren portal.

items.question: Ket noi wifi trong truong bang tai khoan nao?
items.answer: Em su dung tai khoan truong de dang nhap mang wifi noi bo theo huong dan IT.

items.question: Neu em lo qua han mot buoc onboarding thi xu ly sao?
items.answer: Em lien he ngay bo phan phu trach va tao yeu cau bo sung tren portal, dinh kem ly do neu can ngoai le.
